intro: Fairywood Survivors — play as a fairy guardian, unleash powerful magic, grow stronger, and survive endless waves of poisonous creatures invading your forest.
description:
Your forest is dying.

Poisonous creatures crawl beneath ancient roots,
corrupt the air, and hunt your friends.
But they forgot one thing — this forest has a fairy protector.

You are the last spark of light in the darkness.
Each wave of enemies grows faster, deadlier, and more overwhelming.
The screen fills with monsters, and there is nowhere left to run.

Draw power from nature.
Level up.
Unlock devastating spells, magical auras, and new abilities.
With every minute, you transform from a fragile fairy
into a storm of magic that wipes out everything in its path.

This isn’t just survival —
it’s the fury of the forest unleashed.

Easy to start. Impossible to stop.
